allow:
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File - << 'PSEOF'
$file = "C:\\Users\\USER\\Downloads\\falabella\\lib\\totus\\page_admin\\matrices\\matrices_widget.dart"
$content = Get-Content $file -Raw
$old = "              child: Column\(`r`n                mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.max,`r`n                children: [`r`n                    Expanded\(child: Container\(PLACEHOLDER_LIST\)\)"
$new = "              child: SingleChildScrollView\(`r`n                primary: false,`r`n                child: Column\(`r`n                  mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,`r`n                  children: [`r`n                    Padding\(`r`n                      padding:`r`n                          EdgeInsetsDirectional.fromSTEB\(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 16.0\),`r`n                      child: Container\("
$content = $content.Replace\($old, $new\)
Set-Content $file $content -NoNewline
Write-Host "Done. Replacement applied."
PSEOF)
